race.comment: ASK YOUR MOTHER (1) is building to a win, finishing third at Pakenham over 1400m most recently. Admittedly, he was beaten a long way then, but was close-up at the first run back and will be fitter and ready to go at 1600m third-up. Draws beautifully, too. SPIETATA (4) is resuming from a spell of a year and having his first run for the Hanna Powell yard. Was in the placings when first-up from a spell last campaign at Cranbourne over 1600m and will be fitter for a minor placing in a recent Kilmore trial. ADAMANA (9) was well-backed first up and not beaten too far, so might be worth another go with added fitness up to 1600m. BELLE FLAMME (11) could only manage fourth at her latest appearance over 1450m at Kilmore, but she got a long way back and suited this trip. KOKONDA (6) finished seventh over 1400m at Cranbourne last time following a minor placing on debut the run before. Gets the chance to settle closer from the draw here, which could prove crucial.
